2. Use those symbols to resolve the PC addresses to function names

### Thread 7020 — main (`uiTest.MauiTest`) ⚠️ crashed
| Frame | PC | Function | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| #01 | `0x222098` | `ves_icall_System_Environment_FailFast` | `icall.c:6244` |
| #02 | `0x2241ac` | `ves_icall_System_Environment_FailFast_raw` | `icall-def.h:202` |
| #03 | `0x1abc80` | `do_icall` | `interp.c:2457` |
| #04 | `0x16de04` | `handle_isinst` | `type-checking.c:528` |

### Thread 7046 — `SGen worker`
| Frame | PC | Function | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| #02 | `0x2f4b20` | `mono_interp_exec_method` (label jump table) | `interp.c` |
| #03 | `0x2f4c84` | `mono_interp_exec_method` (label jump table) | `interp.c` |

### Thread 7048 — `Finalizer`
| Frame | PC | Function | Source |
|---|---|---|---|
| #02 | `0x2c1a40` | `pin_major_object` | `sgen-marksweep.c:1166` |

**Summary:** The crash is a `SIGABRT` triggered by `Environment.FailFast` called through the Mono interpreter (`do_icall`). The `handle_isinst` frame below it suggests a type-check (`is`/`as` cast) was in progress. The SGen worker and Finalizer threads were idle/blocked at the time of the crash.
